label: Konsumenttjänster – Salong / Skönhet
description: Branschspecifik scaffold för salong, skönhet och liknande konsumenttjänster där bildbevis, prisöversikt och enkel bokning driver konvertering.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende med hygien, omdömen och behandlarpresentation
visa priser, paket och praktisk information

routes.purpose: Presentera salongen, visa känsla och resultat, och leda besökaren vidare till bokning.
Förklara behandlingar och inriktningar så att besökaren förstår vad som erbjuds och kan välja rätt.
Visa prislista och eventuella paket på ett tydligt sätt inför bokning.
Samla bokningsvägar och göra det enkelt att boka tid online eller ta kontakt.
Visa bilder från behandlingar, resultat och salongsmiljö för att stärka förtroendet.
Bygga trygghet genom att presentera behandlare, arbetssätt och salongens profil.
Ge besökaren kontaktuppgifter, öppettider och hitta-hit-information.

routes.when: when the business has recurring pre-booking questions about behandling, förberedelser, betalning eller avbokning

sectionOrderRules: Hero must include service category, local context if known, and a primary booking CTA.
Service summary should highlight the main treatments or specialties without duplicating the full treatments page.
Visual proof such as gallery-preview or reviews may appear before trust-proof when data exists.
Trust-proof should focus on real signals such as hygienrutiner, certifieringar if provided, and kundomdömen without repeating the same claim across multiple sections.
The final conversion section should lead to booking or contact, not both equally.
Services intro must explain the salon's focus and who the treatments are for.
Service list items must be concrete and understandable, for example treatment type, result or session focus.
If pricing-highlights is shown here, it should remain summary-level and not replace the dedicated prices page.
Booking CTA should appear after the main service explanation.
Pricing intro should set expectations clearly, such as from-prices, package logic or consultation note when supplied.
Pricing table must use real service names and avoid vague placeholder labels.
Booking CTA should follow the price content so the visitor can act after comparing options.
Booking intro must explain how to book and what the preferred booking path is.
Booking CTA should be the dominant element on the page.
Contact alternative must provide a fallback path such as phone, email or contact form for visitors who cannot complete online booking.
Gallery should prioritize authentic treatment, result and environment imagery over generic stock-like repetition.
Images should support service understanding and brand feel, not overwhelm the booking CTA.
Booking CTA should appear after or alongside the gallery content.
About story must be personal and specific to the practitioner or salon.
Team should present real people or roles when available; if solo, it may render as a single practitioner profile.
Trust-proof should stay factual and only include credentials or routines that are actually provided.
Contact info must include the real contact methods provided by the business.
Opening hours should be shown when available and not invented.
Map should appear when an address exists.
Contact CTA may be a form or direct contact method, but should not hide phone or address when those exist.

mustPass: Include home, treatments/services, pricing, booking and contact to match salon and beauty conversion needs.
Support strong visual presentation and clear booking flow.
Reflect trust needs for personal services through practitioner presentation, hygiene/trust signals and reviews when available.
Keep route paths Swedish and business-relevant.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not use generic tradesperson structure as the main model.
Do not omit pricing or booking surfaces for this category.
Do not imply medical outcomes, certifications or customer counts that are not provided.
Do not make the gallery the only trust mechanism; practical info and booking clarity are also required.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Salong och skönhet inom konsumenttjänster med fokus på behandlingar, prislista, bildgalleri, bokning online, om oss, kontakt, öppettider och hitta hit. Scaffolden passar verksamheter där resultat, stämning och enkel bokning driver konvertering.
llmClassificationHints: Choose this scaffold for salons, beauty studios and similar appointment-based personal care businesses.
Prefer this when the site needs booking, prices, visual proof and local contact information.
Do not choose this for clinics requiring medical compliance-first structure or for retail-first ecommerce sites.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
